---
title: "POST TITLE"
description: "One sentence explaining the precise question answered by this post."
author: "Alex Benanti"
date: "YYYY-MM-DD"
draft: true
categories:
  - scientific machine learning
jupyter: python3
---

State the question and why it matters.

## Mathematical setup

Introduce only the notation needed for the argument.

$$
\mathcal{F}(u)=0. {#eq-model}
$$

Refer to @eq-model in the prose.

## Main idea

Explain the mechanism before adding technical detail.

## Computational experiment

```{python}
#| label: fig-example
#| fig-cap: "Replace this caption with a claim the figure actually supports."

import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

x = np.linspace(0, 1, 200)
fig, ax = plt.subplots()
ax.plot(x, np.sin(2 * np.pi * x))
ax.set_xlabel("x")
ax.set_ylabel("u(x)")
fig.tight_layout()
```

Discuss what the experiment shows, what it does not show, and which choices could change the conclusion.

## Limitations

List the assumptions and failure modes explicitly.

## Takeaway

End with one precise conclusion.

## References
